message:
test(core): property-based tests for recording, plan, recorder_retention modules

- proptest_recording.rs: 48 tests covering FrameType/DeltaEncoding/DiffOp serde,
  RecordingFrame::encode() roundtrip/length, RecorderEventSource/TextEncoding/
  RedactionLevel/IngressKind/SegmentKind/ControlMarkerType/LifecyclePhase serde,
  RecorderEventPayload tagged serde, RecorderEvent flatten roundtrip,
  parse_recorder_event_json validation, IngressSequence/GlobalSequence monotonicity,
  IngressOutcome variants, RecordingOptions defaults
- proptest_plan.rs: 45 tests covering PlanId/IdempotencyKey serde/Display,
  StepAction/WaitCondition/Precondition/VerificationStrategy/OnFailure serde
  roundtrip + canonical_string idempotence, ActionPlan::compute_hash determinism
  and content-sensitivity, ActionPlanBuilder build(), validate() pass/fail cases,
  action_type_name(), factory methods
- proptest_recorder_retention.rs: 56 tests covering RetentionConfig serde/default/
  validate/retention_hours, SensitivityTier classify/ordering/accelerated_purge/serde,
  SegmentPhase writable/queryable/transitions/ordering/serde, SegmentMeta make_id/
  should_roll/eligible_transition/transition, RetentionManager operations/sweep,
  RetentionStats/SweepResult, RetentionAuditType/Event serde, RetentionError Display

Closes: wa-a0ny, wa-hu36, wa-0u5q

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,16 +32,24 @@ const MS_PER_DAY: u64 = 86_400_000;
 /// Generate a valid RetentionConfig (all fields nonzero, t1_extended_days <= 90).
 fn arb_valid_config() -> impl Strategy<Value = RetentionConfig> {
     (
-        1u32..=720,          // hot_hours
-        1u32..=365,          // warm_days
-        1u32..=365,          // cold_days
-        1u32..=720,          // t3_max_hours
-        1u32..=90,           // t1_extended_days
+        1u32..=720,           // hot_hours
+        1u32..=365,           // warm_days
+        1u32..=365,           // cold_days
+        1u32..=720,           // t3_max_hours
+        1u32..=90,            // t1_extended_days
         1u64..=1_073_741_824, // max_segment_bytes (up to 1GB)
-        1u64..=86_400,       // max_segment_duration_secs (up to 1 day)
+        1u64..=86_400,        // max_segment_duration_secs (up to 1 day)
     )
         .prop_map(
